SAATH PARTS AT CONVENIENCE CHOICE PARTS OF YOUR CHOICE CLUB UNLOCK CLUB BENEFITS SHIELD BE AWARE, BE EMPOWERED

25 years ago, Toyota innovated a brand-new way to drive – the self-charging hybrid electric technology. A smoother, silent and more eﬃcient drive that was engineered to accelerate the world to a better, greener and carbon-neutral future.

Toyota’s self-charging hybrid electric technology combines the advantages of a gasoline engine and an electric motor to give you double the performance with lesser emissions. The car can be driven on electric power as well as with the engine and electric motor working together.

Unlike other cars, Toyota’s hybrid cars are self-charging. And with an unmatched 8-year hybrid battery warranty, Toyota’s hybrid technology is designed to make your every drive simply awesome. Toyota has sold over 2 crore hybrid cars across 140 countries.

Toyota Urban Cruiser Hyryder is the newest and one of the most advanced additions to Toyota’s acclaimed hybrid legacy.

Pg 3 Pg 2 Picture of the vehicle was not taken while driving.

BECOME A PART OF OUR Awesome HYBRID FAMILY

Pg 5 Pg 4 This is the age of the hybrid.

The age of no compromises.

Where you can have it all – the best of both worlds.

And more.

It’s time for you to ride the new wave.

It’s time for you to step into the future.

Because it’s time you lived the hybrid life.

Toyota Urban Cruiser Hyryder.

An advanced SUV that gives you the awesome advantages of hybrid electric and petrol.

So that you can go ahead and live the HY life!

TECH THAT SETS YOU APART Picture of the vehicle was not taken while driving.

The new Toyota Hyryder is bound to turn heads and inspire awe wherever you go.

Because the bold and stunning exterior is designed to simply stay HY on style.

YOU TRAVELLED IN STYLE.

*2 -  Application Features & Displays may vary depending on diﬀerent Operating Systems or Smartphone Devices used.
